hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git push'; then STASHED=0; if ! git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then git stash -q 2>&1 && STASHED=1; fi; git fetch origin main 2>&1 && git rebase origin/main 2>&1; RESULT=$?; if [ $STASHED -eq 1 ]; then git stash pop -q 2>&1 || true; fi; exit $RESULT; fi
